highlights: World's longest cable car ride at 8km, offering 15-20 minutes of panoramic sea and island views
Aquatopia Water Park with multiple slides, lazy pool, and clean facilities included with ticket
All-inclusive ticket covers cable car, water park, theme park, beach access, and complimentary beer

thingsToKnow.crowds: Expect 5,000-7,000+ visitors daily. Peak hours are midday; go early morning or late afternoon. Cable car doesn't operate 11:30am-1:30pm. Exit queues can be long when entire park leaves simultaneously.
thingsToKnow.difficulty: Water park slides require climbing 100-200 steps with no lift access, which can be tiring. Pedestrian-only bridge access with scooter parking further away.
thingsToKnow.safety: Cable car occasionally stops for 5-minute technical repairs; this is normal. Staff enforce strict swimwear rules (no zippers on shorts for certain slides). Safe overall but crowded.
thingsToKnow.accessibility: Limited lift access to water slides; stairs required. Pedestrian bridge to water park area requires walking to distant scooter parking.
thingsToKnow.seasonal: Construction ongoing on parts of the island; some rides and areas may be under renovation. Sunset cable car ride (around 5pm departure) offers magical views.

visitorTips: Book tickets via Klook app to skip queues; scan QR code at entrance. Alternatively, buy at ticket counters.
Arrive early to get free sun beds at beach; visit cable car before or after 11:30am-1:30pm closure. Claim complimentary beer at restaurants.
Plan 4-6 hours minimum; avoid peak lunch hours 11:30am-1:30pm. Time return trip for 3pm-4pm or sunset to minimize exit queues.

faq.question: What's included in the ticket price?
faq.answer: Cable car, water park access, theme park, beach, one complimentary beer or juice. Food costs extra. Kiss Bridge show requires separate ticket.

faq.question: Why does the cable car stop operating at midday?
faq.answer: Cable car closes 11:30am-1:30pm daily. Plan accordingly—visit island in morning or afternoon.

faq.question: How crowded does it get and when is best to visit?
faq.answer: Very crowded daily with 5,000-7,000 visitors. Go early morning or late afternoon to avoid heat and crowds. Early arrival secures free sun beds.

sentiment.positive: Overwhelming praise for cable car views, modern facilities, cleanliness, and staff service. All-inclusive pricing and complimentary beer appreciated.
sentiment.negative: Construction visible on island; some rides under renovation. No cable car-only ticket option. Locker fees expensive (100,000 VND). Shower facilities need improvement. Crowds overwhelming. Cafeteria-style lunch chaotic. Some rides still under maintenance.
